$comment: Versioned, immutable release URL (git tag v2.9.0); 'main' carries the latest. See GOVERNANCE.md.
title: Genlock Audio Map
description: Per-project mapping of shot IDs to audio track assignments. Stored at projects/{slug}/audio-map.json. Each shot may have up to three track types: dialogue, sfx, and music. Used by the Audio page, Timeline, and Production Player for synced playback.

ShotAudioEntry.description: Audio track assignments for a single shot. All three track types are optional; a null value explicitly clears an assignment.

dialogue.description: Path to the dialogue or voiceover audio file for this shot, relative to the workspace root. Null clears the assignment.

sfx.description: Path to the sound effects audio file for this shot, relative to the workspace root. Null clears the assignment.

music.description: Path to the music audio file for this shot, relative to the workspace root. Null clears the assignment.

provenance.description: Optional per-track generation provenance for AI-generated audio, keyed by track type.

Provenance.description: How this render was made: enough to reproduce it, audit it, and disclose it. Hosts SHOULD write this block for every AI-generated track.

provider.description: Provider namespace, e.g. elevenlabs, sonilo, mirelo.

prompt.description: The final assembled prompt sent to the generator.

job_id.description: Provider job/request ID for audit trails.
